productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Polo Turquoise Blue T-Shirt
description: Style NoteWith this T-shirt from adidas with Climacool fabric, you can conveniently ignore the heat and keep your focus right where it needs to be. With a superior performance fabric which keeps cool air flowing in and heat and sweat flowing out, you can stay dry and comfortable, performing at your peak in even the most heated competition. On a day off, pair it with denims and cool sneakers to look your casual best.Product DetailsTurquoise blue polo T-shirt with short sleeves, is engineered with climacool technology, buttoned chest placket, print on the front right side, mesh panels under the armholes, embroidered branding at the back and a vented hem  Material and Care100% polyesterMachine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRelaxed fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
